title: sabulina cismontana
intro: Sabulina cismontana, also known as coastal sandwort, is a plant species in the Caryophyllaceae family, characterized by its small, star-shaped flowers and ability to thrive in coastal areas. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be utilized to treat various health issues. Some of the health benefits associated with Sabulina cismontana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
